column2: *CRATED* Spot Free RO/DI 50 Gallon Dual User 150
column7:
Looking for the ultimate pure water system for your water-fed poles?

Want to be able to bring your own spot free water to a job site?

Want to be able to produce spot free water onsite in the event you need more water than 50 gallons?

These 50 gallon tank systems are the perfect solution for any looking to have an all in one system.

Designed utilizing the highest quality components available today.

Each system includes:

50 Gallon Tank

Powder Coated lightweight aluminum frame

(2) Digital Flow Controller (1) for each operator

(2) Hoses of your choice (1) for each operator (with 150' of 3/8" ID hose)

(2) Premium Tucker® hose reels (1) for each operator

(2) RHG USA Made 12v Pumps (1) for each operator

Sediment / Carbon Pre-filtration

40" Low Pressure RO Membrane powered by an RHG 12 Volt Boost Pump

Deionization final stage

Small Compact Design

Replacement Filter Info-

Sediment Pre-Filter

Carbon Pre-Filter

RO Membrane

DI Post-Filter

Bulk DI resin for refilling DI filter

All RHG and Tucker® brand purification systems come with a 5 year warranty and are assembled in the US.

column2: *CRATED* Spot Free RO/DI 50 Gallon Single User 150
column7:

Want to be able to bring your own spot free water to a job site?

Want to be able to produce spot free water onsite in the event you need more water than 50 gallons?

These 50 gallon tank systems are the perfect solution for any looking to have an all in one system.

Designed utilizing the highest quality components available today.

Each system includes:

50 Gallon Tank

Powder Coated lightweight aluminum frame

Digital Flow Controller

150' of 3/8" ID hose

Premium Tucker® hose reel

RHG USA Made 12v Pumps

Sediment / Carbon Pre-filtration

40" Low Pressure RO Membrane powered by an RHG 12 Volt Boost Pump

Deionization final stage

Small Compact Design

Replacement Filter Info-

Sediment Pre-Filter

Carbon Pre-Filter

RO Membrane

DI Post-Filter

Bulk DI resin for refilling DI filter

All RHG and Tucker® brand purification systems come with a 5 year warranty and are assembled in the US.

Replacement Pressure Gauge
This guage is liquid filled and reads from 0-160 PSI.
This is utilized on the following products.
-110v Booster Pump System
-110v H2Pro RO/DI System
-Tucker® RO/DI Mobile System
-Tucker® RO/DI Fill N Go Tank Systems

column2: 2 Piece Ext Kit w/ Sec ECO-6 and ECO-7
column7: The Tucker® 30 extension is a 2-piece lightweight carbon fiber extension designed specifically for the Tucker® ECO-30 poles. It comes with the Tucker® clamps that bolt on and carries a LIFETIME WARRANTY. This 2-piece extension is added to the base of your Tucker® 30 pole. This allows you to have an extra 10' of reach. Built in end protection on each section protects the carbon fiber. To add this extension, simply remove the end cap from your 30 and slide in into the top section of the extension. Note : We highly recommend you familiarize yourself with appropriate PPE to be used when working on or around electrical hazards including, but not limited to dielectric boots and gloves. Fore more safety information please see this page HERE

column7: Looking for a replacement carbon filter cartridge for 4x40" housings? This is it. These one-time-use carbon filter cartridges fit the 4x40" housings from many manufacturers. Filled with our high-quality activated charcoal carbon, these filters will remove all of the chlorine and chloramines in your water to make it safe for your RO membrane to process. This is NOT the replacement carbon filter cartridge for the 4060 system. The correct replacement carbon filter for the 4060 is the 4 X 30" FILTER CARTRIDGE - CARBON New carbon filters must be flushed independently of other system components. Just disconnect the outlet tube from your carbon filter housing, point in a safe direction and run for 5 minutes. Black water will exit this tube. After flushing, remove plug and connect hose. You also must flush subsequent replacement carbon filters.

The BE Power Equipment B4213HACS 4200PSI/4.2GPM Pressure Washer is engineered to handle even your toughest jobs commercial or residential. Built on an aluminum frame to reduce weight and will last longer as it resists corrosion.

Powered by a Honda GX390 engine for tackling your toughest job. The large capacity fuel tank provides longer runtime, an automatic low oil shutdown shuts the engine off if your oil is low and a thermal relief valve on the pump that dumps out built-up hot water if you happen to leave your machine running and unattended. Featuring a durable, hand truck frame design and large 12 in. flat-free wheels, this pressure washer is designed for easy transport.

Easily access hard-to-reach areas with the included 50 ft. steel braided high-pressure hose with quick-connect fittings. This pressure washer includes 4 quick-connect nozzles (15°, 25°, 40° and Soap).


Features of the B4213HACS 4200PSI Pressure Washer:

  • Powered with Honda GX390 engine, capable of handling tough cleaning tasks
  • Commercial-grade Comet triplex pump
  • Aluminum frames reduces weight and resists corrosion
  • 50’ high-pressure steel braided hose with quick-connect feature
  • 36” insulated spray gun wand assembly
  • Safety features include thermal relief valves and safety locks on the spray gun
  • 4 Quick-Connect Nozzles (15°, 25°, 40° and Soap)
  • 12” flat free tires, easily handles going over rough terrain
  • Our products are functionally tested in the factory and may contain minimum residual oil and/or fuel odor

column7:
Are you the DIY type?
These delivery panels are pretty sweet.  They are made from a lightweight aluminum and easily mount to many different surfaces.
They include the RHG delivery pump with digital flow controller and on/off Remote control.
The pump will siphon your pure water holding tank and deliver the water via a hose (not included) to your water-fed pole.
The digital flow controller allows you to turn up or down the flow/pressure of your pump based on your specific job.  This in turn allows you to conserve your pure water supply for the day.
The remote has multiple functions built in including the ability to turn up, down, and off the flow of water.
Simply hook the inlet side of the pump up to a short hose that siphons your tank and the outlet side of the pump to a hose/reel that feeds your water-fed pole.
Utilizes the V16 Flow Controllers.
The only other thing you need is a 12 volt battery to supply this power.
Not sure how to hook it up?  Give us a call and we'll walk you through the process.

column7: Nozzle opener tool quickly cleans material from nozzle orifice, extending the nozzle life. Brass construction

NuTopp is a treatment made for asphalt shingles that are drying out, cracking, or losing flexibility. And if you do roof washing all the time, you probably know how common that is. NuTopp helps by going deeper than surface-level coatings, and it does that through something called diffusion.

So what is diffusion? It’s when the sun heats the roof and slowly pulls the product deeper into the asphalt binder which is the part of the shingle where most of the damage happens. As that happens, NuTopp starts replacing the stuff that’s been lost over time like the oils that used to keep the shingle flexible and sealed.


Here’s how NuTopp works:

  • Bio-based oils replace the lighter parts of the asphalt called maltenes, which break down from heat, UV, and oxidation
  • A penetrating oil softens the shingle so the product can move deeper
  • A rejuvenating oil breaks up hardened asphaltenes and helps them recombine with fresh maltene-like components
  • An adhesion modifier strengthens the bond between the asphalt and its granules and improves water resistance

Altogether, that brings back the way the asphalt flows and softens, which is what gives the roof its flexibility and protection in the first place.

That way, you can give more value to your customers by helping them hold off on a full roof replacement and show that you care more than just about appearances.

Hard to access windows or solar panels on the job site? The Tucker® H2Go is your ultimate weapon against those hard to get to windows or areas without water connections for your mobile Tucker® RO/DI carts.
Capable of carrying 20 gallons of ultra pure water, the Tucker® H2Go features a remote controlled delivery system with the ability to turn up, down, on or off your pure water flow at the press of a button.

Simply fill your H2Go with ultra pure water, wheel it to your hard to access area, such as atriums, courtyards, or any other areas you can not get your vehicle near.

Built in is a 100 foot length of Tucker® high flow hose, a lithium battery, charging system, pump, and flow controller with remote control.

At the end of the day simply connect the built in charging port to your extension cord/power supply and recharge for the next day.
